title: Analyse tree structure and biomechanics
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Analyse tree structure and biomechanics demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine existing physical loads and strengths of trees, branches and anchorage

pcs.text: Determine existing physical loads affecting trees
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine existing physical loads affecting trees?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine existing physical loads affecting trees.

pcs.text: Identify source and factors causing stress on trees
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify source and factors causing stress on trees?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify source and factors causing stress on trees.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess root plate environment and history for damage.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess history of pruning operations to above and below ground components.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine presence and extent of defects on trunk and root system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine presence and extent of defects on trunk and root system.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess strength and material properties of tree structural components?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess strength and material properties of tree structural components.
